title: eragrostis tef subsp. spiciformis
intro: Eragrostis tef subsp. spiciformis, also known as tef, is a type of grass native to Ethiopia, belonging to the family Poaceae. Traditionally used in Ethiopian folk medicine, the plant has been found to possess medicinal properties due to its high concentration of silica and other nutrients. The health benefits of Eragrostis tef subsp. spiciformis include its ability to support digestive health, boost energy, and help to regulate blood sugar levels. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of tea or ground into flour for use in traditional bread-making, where its high fiber content is thought to provide additional nutritional benefits.
